raw.objective: “the final model can be used to predict the dose required to achieve a particular serum concentration in an individual patient”
raw.covariates: Tested: WT, race, gender, age, comedication with CBZ, PHT, or VPA on CL Included: WT, comedication with CBZ, PHT, or VPA on CL
raw.observations: One term is used for either/both CBZ and PHT influence on PHB CL. No goodness of fit was given. No effect of race and no significant difference in CL found with studies in other paediatric populations
raw.equations: M=1 if(VPA==1) M=theta3 if(CBZ==1 | PHT==1) M=theta4 CL/F=exp(theta1*WT + theta2)*M*(1+eta1) Css=D/(CL*Tau) Cobs=Css*(1+eps1) CBZ: comedication with carbamazepine (yes=1, no=0) PHT: comedication with phenytoin (yes=1, no=0) VPA: comedication with valproate/valproic acid (yes=1, no=0) Eta and eps were said to be modelled additive, but reported as CV%, here as proportional
raw.parameter_values: theta1=0.029 theta2=-2.53 theta3=0.62 theta4=0.87 omega1=0.0328 sigma1=0.0324

extraction_target.title: Determination of phenobarbitone population clearance values for South African children.

omega.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale OMEGA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

sigma.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale SIGMA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

extraction_target.residual_error: M=1 if(VPA==1) M=theta3 if(CBZ==1 | PHT==1) M=theta4 CL/F=exp(theta1*WT + theta2)*M*(1+eta1) Css=D/(CL*Tau) Cobs=Css*(1+eps1) CBZ: comedication with carbamazepine (yes=1, no=0) PHT: comedication with phenytoin (yes=1, no=0) VPA: comedication with valproate/valproic acid (yes=1, no=0) Eta and eps were said to be modelled additive, but reported as CV%, here as proportional
extraction_target.notes: Appendix-derived silver reference; compare with the publication before promotion to a gold tier.

study.objective: “the final model can be used to predict the dose required to achieve a particular serum concentration in an individual patient”

covariates.raw: Tested: WT, race, gender, age, comedication with CBZ, PHT, or VPA on CL Included: WT, comedication with CBZ, PHT, or VPA on CL

normalization.omega: Values labelled OMEGA in the appendix are retained as NONMEM variances; no CV reconversion is applied.
normalization.eta: ETA distribution is inferred only when the appendix equation explicitly uses exp(ETA) or additive ETA.
normalization.source_text: The appendix row is preserved verbatim in raw; normalized fields never replace it.
